ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CHARACTER_MIZUKI.cardsM: Mizuki's cards can now appear in rewards and shops.
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CHARACTER_MIZUKI.descri:
A being born of both Seaborn and humanity.
Operator [blue]Mizuki[/blue] has come to conquer the Spire and quell the wrath of We Many.
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CHARACTER_MIZUKI.eventD: I still have to keep waiting...
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CHARACTER_MIZUKI.title: Mizuki
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_CHARACTER_MIZUKI.unlock: Play a run with [pink]{Prerequisite}[/pink] to unlock this character.
